metric_results.remediation_hint: Raise first-rank authoritative hits and source-tier alignment instead of relying only on top-k presence.

parameters.rationale: Ceiling-resistant score: top-5 hits receive less credit unless the authoritative source is rank 1 and source-tier aligned.
parameters.aggregation_policy: full cohort denominator; missing or not_applicable score samples count as zero
